posts.author: Ashton (Ashton)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

I’m struggling to use this wonderful tool. Can anyone help me to solve this problem?

So I already integrated my Gmail account with Monday.com.
What I want to do is I would like to receive emails from clients in the designated item.

Let’s say I already have my sales board and there’s an item in the board.
I would like to track and save all the emails in the item.

Please help me!!

Thanks!
